other_observers: J Dan Brooke; We are both the original and independent viewers of these birds at this time.
specific_location: Elk Thistle Drive private feeders, at end of a cul de sac.
description: Small flock of eight redpolls, males with red caps and breast, females with red limited to cap. Smaller than house finches, with small yellow bills, prominent streaking on flanks. Feed as a flock on tube feeder, which contained niger seed.Behaviors: Flock fed actively, intermittently flying to cover in nearby evergreens, then returning as a group to what seemed to be the preferred feeder.Call: A few call notes were heard as birds fed.Plumage: Adult
